text:
Once upon an ancient time, there lived an owl named Olive. She loved berries. Everywhere she flew, berries awaited her. But one day she flew too close to crimson. Owies!

Flinching, she flew south. That's where berries smelled sweet. A cherry branch seemed kinder.

That night, dreams floated on bees' wings. An oak. Honeycomb. A dream.

Wake! A raven.

She took wing. Raindrops.

Snow lay down. Hmmm. Her friends said snow felt cozy. Why not?

At night, soft stars. A quiet owl.

She'd sleep. Just maybe.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
